Sector.title: Sector
Sector.description: Represents a department or sector within the company, used to organize employees.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sector entity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the sector was created.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents a staff member within the company, associated with one or more sectors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the employee.

jobTitle.description: The job title or position of the employee.

email.description: The email address of the employee.

unidade.description: The physical unit or branch where the employee works.

photoUrl.description: URL pointing to the employee's profile photo.

setor_ids.description: References to the Sectors the employee belongs to.

status.description: The current employment status of the employee (e.g., 'active', 'inactive').

is_lider.description: Indicates if the employee is a leader in their sector.

titulo_lider.description: Custom title for the leadership position (e.g., 'Coordenador', 'Diretor').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the employee record was created.

AdministratorProfile.title: AdministratorProfile
AdministratorProfile.description: Represents an administrative user with privileges to manage sectors and employees.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AdministratorProfile entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the administrator.

email.description: The email address of the administrator.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.
